# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: firewall-rules
  type: google::compute::firewall
  properties:
  - name: firewall-ssh
    properties:
      targetTags:
      - development
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
        - ports: '22'
        - sourceRanges: 0.0.0.0/0

  - name: firewall-rdp
    properties:
      targetTags:
      - development
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
        - ports: '3389'
        - sourceRanges: 0.0.0.0/0

  - name: firewall-http
    properties:
      targetTags:
      - development
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
        - ports: '80'
        - sourceRanges: 0.0.0.0/0

  - name: firewall-https
    properties:
      targetTags:
      - development
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: TCP
        - ports: '443'
        - sourceRanges: 0.0.0.0/0
